rationale: The agent correctly enumerated all 11 Lua scripts in `walrus/scripts/`, read all relevant Python modules (database.py, containers.py, lock.py, rate_limit.py, query.py), and accurately cross-referenced each script to its calling Python class/method. It correctly identified the script-loading mechanism in `Database.init_scripts()` and `Database.run_script()`, mapped all 11 scripts to their callers (containers.py for 6 array scripts, database.py for cas, lock.py for lock_acquire/lock_release, rate_limit.py for rate_limit, query.py for zset_score_filter), and correctly reported no orphans. It did not fabricate scripts, did not leak full Lua source code, and did not rely solely on file existence to claim a script was active. This is a thorough, accurate execution of the clean task.
